programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz. Covers Sommersby, Trespass, Jamon Jamon, Pandora's Box with Jen Anderson, A French Vampire in America, What Happened to Santiago, Deep Cover.

programme.title: Faking Influence
programme.desc: In a wild experiment, journalist Calliste Weitenberg and producer Elise Potaka build a fake influencer persona to see if they can cash in on what's now a $15 billion dollar industry.

programme.title: Black Comedy in America
programme.desc: Steve Harvey, Cedric the Entertainer, D.L. Hughley, and the late Bernie Mac joined forces nearly 20 years ago to make comedy magic and launch their careers into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Black Comedy in America
programme.desc: Russell Simmons and Stan Lathan fuse a hip-hop sensibility with cutting-edge comedy voices to create a groundbreaking franchise with enduring cultural impact.

programme.title: Wine Lovers' Guide To Australia
programme.desc: Wine expert Grant Van Every, winemaker Maryann Egan and SBS's Pria Viswalingam visit wine regions and talk to winemakers about the challenges of growing new grape varieties. (An SBS-TV prod). (Rpt).

programme.title: Wine Lovers' Guide To Australia
programme.desc: Maryann takes us through the merits of chardonnay; Pria visits Jimmy Watson's wine bar in Melbourne, and Grant introduces us to a destructive little aphid called phylloxera.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Tonight's specialty subjects are: The British Royal Family in the 20th Century, the Life and Works of J.R.R. Tolkien, Friends: Celebrity Guest Star Episodes and the Career of Sachin Tendulkar.

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Tonight's specialty subjects are: The Works of Jim Henson, The Bone People by Keri Hulme, Michael Hussey's Test Career and Doctor Who: the Russell T Davies First Era.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World
programme.desc: Computer giants race to build the first portable devices. Amid failures, alliances and the return of an American icon, they create handhelds then revolutionise tech with the smartphone.

programme.title: Abandoned Americana
programme.desc: Abandoned Americana seeks to tell the hidden history of the United States through its forgotten ruins and those who know their stories.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Star Wars
programme.desc: In episode one of Icons Unearthed: Star Wars, we explore how the original film reshaped cinema, despite a turbulent production that nearly broke its creator, George Lucas.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Star Wars
programme.desc: In episode two of Icons Unearthed: Star Wars, a troubled shoot gives way to daunting post-production, where a scrappy team transforms the film and redefines \.

programme.title: The Feed Debate
programme.desc: Capitalism has lifted millions out of poverty, but the divide between rich and poor is growing wider. Is capitalism still working, or has it outlived its purpose?

programme.title: History's Greatest Heists Pierce Brosnan
programme.desc: An armoured-car depot employee uses his insider knowledge to plan a heist that could net him, and the longtime friends he recruits, more than $18 million in cash.

programme.title: History's Greatest Heists Pierce Brosnan
programme.desc: Two thieves dressed as fake cops make off with a half-billion dollars' worth of world-class artwork from a Boston museum. Although the paintings are still missing, numerous suspects turn up dead.

programme.title: WWE Legends
programme.desc: The British Bulldog, Davey Boy Smith, arguably the greatest British wrestler of all time, lived a life of extreme highs and extreme lows. At 15 years old, Davey Boy began his wrestling career as the youngest British wrestler ever and went on to achieve worldwide fame while main eventing London's Wembley Stadium.

programme.title: Nine Lives of...
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger harnessed his relentless drive to transcend multiple scandals and secure his place as an indelible icon of American culture.

programme.title: NHK World English News
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News Hour
programme.desc: In-depth global news from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Doha, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: TRT World News
programme.desc: The latest news from around the globe from TRT World, Istanbul, Turkiye, in English.

programme.title: France 24 Africa News
programme.desc: Join France24's Georja Calvin-Smith for a round up of the week's cultural and current affairs stories from across the African continent. Delivered via satellite from Paris, in English, no subtitles. Watch on SBS VICELAND at 06:30am every Sunday, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programme.title: DW English News
programme.desc: News and analysis of the top international and European news and current affairs from Berlin, in English.

programme.title: FBC News
programme.desc: Local, world, sport and entertainment news in English from FBC News, Suva Fiji.

programme.title: France 24 Feature
programme.desc: News feature in English from France 24, Paris.

programme.title: euronews
programme.desc: Headlines, Breaking News & Analysis from the Euronews news centre in Brussels, Belgium, in English.

programme.title: DW Global Us
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle's news magazine looks at the issues that are moving us today and shows how people are living with the opportunities and risks of globalisation.

programme.title: CBC The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang from Toronto, Canada. Watch on SBS VICELAND at 08:40am everyday, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programme.title: PBS News Horizons
programme.desc: Dive into the world of science, health, technology and environmental issues making headlines each week, hosted by PBS News Hour's William Brangham, with in-depth discussions featuring leading experts and professionals.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: The Cook Up with Adam Liaw Bitesize
programme.desc: Join host Adam Liaw and all your favourite chefs, cooks and celebrities for the best bits from The Cook Up kitchen.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Hi-Tech Oils Super Series
programme.desc: The 2026 Hi-Tec Oils Super Series heads north to Queensland Raceway in Ipswich, QLD, for round two of the season, headlined by the ever popular TA2 Racing Muscle Car Series.

programme.title: Lee Lin Chin's Fashionista
programme.desc: Hosted by TV's iconic fashion guru Lee Lin Chin, this episode features children's couturiers.

programme.title: France 24 International News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS Washington Week with the Atlantic
programme.desc: PBS Washington Week with The Atlantic is the longest-running primetime news and public affairs program on television. The show features a group of journalists participating in a weekly roundtable discussion of major news events. Moderated by Jeffrey Goldberg, Editor-in-Chief of The Atlantic.

programme.title: PBS News Compass Points
programme.desc: Join PBS News Hour's Nick Schifrin and a panel of experts each week analysing prominent international affairs topics and America's role in a shifting world, breaking down global conflicts, rising tensions, and their implications for U.S. interests.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A decrepit Liberian landmark with American origins; a desolate town in Belgium that stands in the shadow of its destroyer; a high-altitude retreat, once a world-class sporting resort, now drained of its lifeblood by a global threat; and a pioneering scientific structure in Cleveland rendered obsolete by light pollution.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A music mecca in New Orleans that dared to take on the authorities and paid the price; an epic ruin built to defend the most unlikely of treasures; and the legacy of a military exercise that terrified the West. Standing on the brink of collapse, some soon to be lost forever, these ruined sites have suffered through devastating natural disasters, years of violent wars, and events far more surprising.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Star Wars
programme.desc: Attempting to break away from the studio system, George Lucas risked it all by self-funding Empire Strikes Back. With Lucas focused on the business, a new director took the reins.

programme.title: Myths: Greatest Mysteries Of Humanity
programme.desc: Cleopatra is the embodiment of beauty, luxury and dangerous femininity, and is arguably the most famous woman in history. For over than 2000 years, countless stories have circulated about the Egyptian ruler. But which ones are true? Will the latest archaeological discoveries give insight into the real life story of Egypt's final queen?

programme.title: House Of Blak: Miss First Nation
programme.desc: The Miss First Nation crown awaits. We see raw, unfiltered moments, the nerves between acts, the joy and power of each performance, and the deep connection between the queens.

programme.title: Myths: Greatest Mysteries Of Humanity
programme.desc: Age-old stories and archaeological discoveries reveal magical practices and tell tales of both alluring and terrifying women with special powers. In early modern times, people believed they were working for the devil, bringing about crop failures and illnesses. Women suspected of witchcraft were often burned at the stake.

programme.title: Conversations with Friends
programme.desc: Frances writes her first short story. Her health is still causing problems and she collapses at school. Bobbi brings her home, and as Frances recovers they talk more honestly about their friendship. Nick makes a surprising revelation. Stars Alison Oliver, Sasha Lane and Joe Alwyn.

programme.title: Conversations with Friends
programme.desc: Frances receives a surprise email from Melissa, testing the group's dynamic in unsuspected ways. Frances' dad leaves a concerning voicemail. Bobbi and Frances experience a shift in their friendship. Stars Alison Oliver, Sasha Lane and Joe Alwyn.

programme.title: NHK World English News
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News Hour
programme.desc: In-depth global news from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Doha, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: TRT World News
programme.desc: The latest news from around the globe from TRT World, Istanbul, Turkiye, in English.

programme.title: France 24 Feature
programme.desc: News feature in English from France 24, Paris.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: Africa is home to a large number of youth as they constitute 77 percent of the continent's population. A few ambitious youngsters come together to share their vision for the continent's future.

programme.title: FBC News
programme.desc: Local, world, sport and entertainment news in English from FBC News, Suva Fiji.

programme.title: France 24 Feature
programme.desc: News feature in English from France 24, Paris.

programme.title: euronews
programme.desc: Headlines, Breaking News & Analysis from the Euronews news centre in Brussels, Belgium, in English.

programme.title: DW English News
programme.desc: News and analysis of the top international and European news and current affairs from Berlin, in English.

programme.title: DW Euromaxx
programme.desc: Magazine programs Euromaxx, Sports Life and other features as broadcast by DW News in Berlin, Germany.

programme.title: PBS News Horizons
programme.desc: Dive into the world of science, health, technology and environmental issues making headlines each week, hosted by PBS News Hour's William Brangham, with in-depth discussions featuring leading experts and professionals.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz. Covers Used People with Beeban Kidron, plus The Vanishing, Consenting Adults, The Joy Luck Club, Fire in the Sky and Passion Fish.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton. Covers Falling Down with Joel Schumacher, Blade Runner (uncut), Johnny Stecchino, Love in Limbo with David Elfick, and Singles.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review from Cannes. Covers Last Action Hero, Naked, The Piano, Faraway, So Close, Farewell My Concubine and Much Ado About Nothing, plus interviews with cast and filmmakers.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: Pitino: Red Storm Rising
programme.desc: An unexpected detour leads to another championship for Rick Pitino. A St. John's alum gives back to the program while one of Coach's favourite players follows him to Queens.

programme.title: Pitino: Red Storm Rising
programme.desc: The Red Storm are taking over New York as the Big East Tournament begins. Rick reflects on the start of his career and a key transfer cherishes his second chance on the court.
